title: Implement User Authentication API
description: Create the API endpoint and service logic for authenticating registered users (login) and terminating sessions (logout).
ai_instructions: Follow TDD. The login service should validate credentials and return a session token (e.g., JWT). The logout logic should invalidate the token if using a blacklist strategy.
execution_steps: Add new test cases to 'tests/auth.test.ts' for the 'POST /login' and 'POST /logout' endpoints.
Run tests and see them fail.
Add handlers for the '/login' and '/logout' routes in 'src/controllers/AuthController.ts'.
Implement the logic to validate passwords and issue/invalidate tokens.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-008' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoint 'POST /login' successfully authenticates users and returns a token.
API endpoint 'POST /logout' successfully terminates a session.
Invalid login attempts are rejected with a 401 status.
All tests for the authentication feature pass.
